title: [spec-compliance] Trickle Imin default violates spec constant
description: Kconfig LICHEN_RPL_TRICKLE_IMIN_MS defaults to 1000 but spec/05-routing.md:129, appendix-rpl.md:25, constants.toml:59 and draft-lichen-rpl-lora-00.md require 4096ms (Imin=4s). Recent change in lichen/subsys/lichen/rpl/Kconfig and trickle.c:58,74,89. Violates MUST for RPL timing on LoRa. See explore task ses_073e4d927ffefBtVI7t0ZbfOkP for details.
close_reason: Fixed Kconfig default to 4096ms to match spec, constants.toml, and draft-lichen-rpl-lora-00.md. Only changed default; tests use explicit values and remain unchanged.
